name: United Check Cashing
description_short: United Check Cashing is a two-location financial services center in Claymont, DE and West Berlin, NJ offering check cashing, money orders, transfers, and prepaid cards.
description_long:
United Check Cashing operates two physical storefronts — one in Claymont, Delaware and one in West Berlin, New Jersey — serving consumers who prefer to manage their finances on a cash basis. The company markets itself as an alternative to traditional banking with the tagline "Better than a bank," targeting customers who are unbanked, underbanked, or simply prefer cash-based transactions for their day-to-day financial needs. Both locations are open late nights, positioning the business for customers who cannot access bank branches during standard business hours.

The company's core offering is check cashing for both individuals and businesses, including checks made payable to a business entity. Beyond that, United Check Cashing functions as a broad financial services center: customers can send or receive money internationally and domestically, purchase money orders, pay bills electronically across hundreds of accepted billers (most posting within two business days), and buy prepaid Visa or Mastercard debit cards loaded with any cash amount. Customers can also load or unload any PIN-based debit card for cash on the spot. Select locations extend this further with gold, silver, and platinum buying, gift card purchasing for immediate cash, coin counting machines, Bitcoin sales, notary services, transit passes and tokens, prepaid phone cards, and copy and fax services.

What distinguishes United Check Cashing from single-service check cashers is the breadth of offerings concentrated in a small regional footprint. The ability to cash a business check, send an international wire, pay a utility bill, and purchase cryptocurrency in one visit is uncommon for a two-location independent operator. The company explicitly accommodates business customers by cashing checks made payable to a business, which expands its utility for contractors, sole proprietors, and small business owners who need immediate liquidity.

As a two-location regional operation, United Check Cashing lacks the geographic reach or digital access of national chains. Fee schedules for check cashing and other services are not published on the website, making it impossible to compare costs before visiting in person. Consumers with active bank accounts and mobile deposit access will find free or lower-cost alternatives for most of these services. For unbanked or underbanked individuals specifically in the Claymont, DE and West Berlin, NJ areas who need same-day cash and multiple financial services under one roof, it is a practical local option — but the service area is narrow.
pros: Cashes checks made payable to businesses, not just individuals
International and domestic money transfers available in-store
Electronic bill payment accepted for hundreds of billers, most posting within two business days
Sells prepaid Visa and Mastercard debit cards and loads/unloads existing PIN-based debit cards
Sells Bitcoin directly in-store for immediate access to cryptocurrency
Buys gold, silver, and platinum jewelry at select locations
Extended late-night hours accommodate customers who cannot visit during bank business hours
cons: Only two physical locations — exclusively serves Claymont, DE and West Berlin, NJ
Fee schedule not published on website; costs require an in-person visit or phone call to confirm
No online or mobile services — every transaction requires a physical store visit
Several services (gold buying, gift card purchasing, notary, coin counting, Bitcoin) are only available at select locations, not guaranteed at both
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers living near Claymont, DE or West Berlin, NJ
Small business owners and contractors who need to cash business-payable checks immediately
Individuals sending money internationally without a bank account
Consumers who need multiple financial services — bill pay, money orders, prepaid cards — completed in a single cash-based stop
diagnosis: United Check Cashing is best suited for unbanked or underbanked residents of Delaware and New Jersey who need immediate check-cashing access combined with bill payment, remittances, or prepaid card services in a single visit. The primary caveat is that fee transparency is absent from the website and the service area is limited to two physical locations with no digital channel, making it impractical for anyone outside the immediate area or those with existing bank accounts.
services: Electronic bill payment (hundreds of billers accepted)
Prepaid Visa and Mastercard debit cards
PIN-based debit card loading and unloading
Gold, silver, and platinum jewelry buying
